description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge touchscreen display with a dark blue gradient wallpaper, weather widget, and app icons, as well as a small notch at the top for sensors. The back is a glossy red finish with the brand name 'DISITECH' and a prominent square camera module housing four lenses and a flash in the upper left corner. The sides are slim and black, with subtle red accents and visible seams for button placement. The device appears to be constructed primarily from glass and metal, with plastic or composite elements for structural support. Its overall design is contemporary and premium, suitable for use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a glossy red back, large touchscreen display, and a square quad-camera module. The device features a premium finish and minimalistic design details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large touchscreen display with a blue gradient wallpaper, weather widget, and app icons, as well as a small notch at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the slim profile of the phone with subtle red accents and no visible buttons.
description_view_2: Back view displays the glossy red finish, 'DISITECH' branding, and a square quad-camera module with flash in the upper left corner.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the slim profile with red accents and a possible seam for button placement.
attribute_brand_logo: White 'DISITECH' text logo centered on the upper back of the device, below the camera module.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a blue gradient wallpaper, a weather widget showing -2°C and cloudy in Saskatoon, a Google search bar, and several app icons including phone, messages, and camera. The status bar at the top shows time, battery, and signal indicators.
attribute_camera_placement: Quad-camera module arranged in a square with a flash, located in the upper left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: No physical buttons are visible in the provided views, but seams on the sides suggest possible button placement.
